title: MySql递归查询
content:
MySql递归查询MySql查询所有子节点SELECT p.id 
FROM (SELECT * FROM sfc_kpi_permission WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL) p,
     (SELECT @pid := '6') parentId 
WHERE FIND_IN_SET(parent_id, @pid) > 0 
  AND @pid := concat(@pid, ',', id)
union select id from sfc_kpi_permission where id = '6';

MySql查询所有父级节点SELECT p.id 
FROM (SELECT * FROM sfc_kpi_permission WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL) p,
     (SELECT @pid := '6,8') parentId 
WHERE FIND_IN_SET(parent_id, @pid) > 0 
  AND @pid := concat(@pid, ',', id) 
union select id from sfc_kpi_permission where FIND_IN_SET(id,@pid) > 0;

title: Hexo+GitAction自动化构建发布博客
content:
新建一个私有仓库绑定私有秘钥添加自动化构建脚本# workflow name
name: Hexo Blog CI
# master branch on push, auto run
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      # check it to your workflow can access it
      # from: https://github.com/actions/checkout
      - name: Checkout Repository master branch
        uses: actions/checkout@master

      # from: https://github.com/actions/setup-node
      - name: Setup Node.js 12.x
        uses: actions/setup-node@master
        with:
          node-version: "12.x"

      - name: Setup Hexo Dependencies
        run: |
          npm install hexo-cli -g
          npm install

      - name: Setup Deploy Private Key
        env:
          HEXO_DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.HEXO_DEPLOY_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh/
          echo "$HEXO_DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa 
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

      - name: Setup Git Infomation
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'twitf' 
          git config --global user.email 'qiangzaiying@outlook.com'
      - name: Deploy Hexo
        run: |
          hexo clean
          hexo generate 
          hexo deploy

title: Docker 常用镜像部署
content:
docker rabbitmqdocker run --privileged --restart=always -it -d --hostname=rabbitmq --name=rabbitmq -e RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER=twitf -e RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS=twitf -p 15672:15672 rabbitmq


rabbitmq-plugins enable --offline rabbitmq_mqtt rabbitmq_federation_management rabbitmq_stomp rabbitmq_management_agent


cd  /etc/rabbitmq/conf.d/
echo management_agent.disable_metrics_collector = false > management_agent.disable_metrics_collector.conf 

docker mariadbdocker run -it -d --name mariadb -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=root -p 3306:3306 mariadb

docker elasticsearchdocker run -d --name es -p 9200:9200 -p 9300:9300 -e "discovery.type=single-node" elasticsearch:latest

docker run --name mongo -p 27017:27017 -d mongo

redisdocker run --name redis -p 6379:6379 -d redis redis-server --appendonly yes

docker  run --name nacos -d -p 8848:8848 --privileged=true --restart=always -e JVM_XMS=256m -e JVM_XMX=256m -e MODE=standalon

Nacosdocker run --env PREFER_HOST_MODE=hostname --privileged --restart=always -it -d --env MODE=standalone --env NACOS_AUTH_ENABLE=true --name nacos -p 8848:8848 nacos/nacos-server
beanstalkd(延迟队列)docker run --privileged --restart=always -it -d -p 11300:11300 schickling/beanstalkd

title: Mysql关联更新
content:
Mysql关联更新UPDATE sfc_kpi_user_calibration_import_copy2 as i,sfc_kpi_user as u  
SET i.be_evaluate_user_id = u.user_id  
WHERE  
i.be_employee_number = u.employee_number  
and u.type = 0
